content:
```json
[
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 67, 126, 87], "text_content": "ST"},
	{"bbox_2d": [815, 67, 927, 81], "text_content": "STUSB4500"},
	{"bbox_2d": [757, 84, 927, 95], "text_content": "Description of the features"},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 123, 87, 138], "text_content": "3"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 123, 463, 139], "text_content": "Description of the features"},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 177, 98, 190], "text_content": "3.1"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 177, 285, 192], "text_content": "CC interface"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 198, 925, 211], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 controls the connection to the configuration channel (CC) pins, CC1 and CC2, through two main"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 212, 601, 225], "text_content": "blocks: the CC line interface block and the CC control logic block."},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 227, 419, 239], "text_content": "The CC line interface block is used to:"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 243, 528, 255], "text_content": "Set pull-down termination mode on the CC pins"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 258, 749, 270], "text_content": "Monitor the CC pin voltage values related to the attachment detection thresholds"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 273, 475, 285], "text_content": "Protect the CC pins against overvoltage"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 288, 401, 300], "text_content": "The CC control logic block is used to:"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 304, 783, 320], "text_content": "Execute the Type-C FSM related to the sink power role with debug accessory support"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 324, 690, 336], "text_content": "Determine the electrical state for each CC pin related to the detected thresholds"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 339, 927, 351], "text_content": "Evaluate the conditions relative to the CC pin states and the VBUS voltage value to transition from one state"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 354, 450, 366], "text_content": "to another in the Type-C FSM"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 369, 496, 381], "text_content": "Advertise a valid source-to-sink connection"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 384, 621, 396], "text_content": "Determine the attached device mode: source or debug accessory"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 400, 673, 412], "text_content": "Determine cable orientation to allow external routing of the USB data"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 415, 821, 427], "text_content": "Manage USB Type-C power capability on VBUS: USB default, medium or high current mode"},
	{"bbox_2d": [212, 430, 365, 442], "text_content": "Handle hardware faults"},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 467, 98, 480], "text_content": "3.2"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 467, 377, 482], "text_content": "Power delivery blocks"},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 501, 108, 513], "text_content": "3.2.1"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 501, 277, 515], "text_content": "Physical layer"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 518, 927, 530], "text_content": "The physical layer defines the signaling technology for USB power delivery. It is the physical link between CC pins"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 532, 923, 544], "text_content": "and protocol layer. In Tx mode, it receives packet data from the protocol layer, calculates and appends a CRC,"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 547, 923, 559], "text_content": "encodes the payload (i.e. packet data and CRC) and transmits the packet (i.e. preamble, SOP, payload, CRC and"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 562, 923, 574], "text_content": "EOP) using biphase mark coding (i.e. BMC) over CC pins. In Rx mode, it recovers the clock and the data, detects"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 577, 673, 589], "text_content": "the SOP, decodes the received data including the CRC, detects the EOP and validates the CRC."},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 597, 108, 609], "text_content": "3.2.2"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 597, 277, 610], "text_content": "Protocol layer"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 614, 887, 626], "text_content": "The protocol layer has the responsibility to manage the messages from/to the physical layer. It automatically"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 629, 897, 641], "text_content": "manages the protocol receive timeouts, the message counter, the retry counter and the GoodCRC messages."},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 644, 481, 656], "text_content": "It communicates with the internal policy engine."},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 674, 108, 686], "text_content": "3.2.3"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 674, 272, 687], "text_content": "Policy engine"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 690, 877, 702], "text_content": "The policy engine implements the power negotiation with the connected device according to its sink role. It"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 705, 837, 717], "text_content": "implements all state machines controlling the protocol layer that forms and schedules the messages."},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 720, 624, 732], "text_content": "The policy engine uses the protocol layer to send/receive messages."},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 735, 923, 747], "text_content": "The policy engine interprets the device policy manager's input in order to implement policy for port and directs the"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 750, 467, 762], "text_content": "protocol layer to send appropriate messages."},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 780, 108, 792], "text_content": "3.2.4"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 780, 348, 793], "text_content": "Device policy manager"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 795, 866, 807], "text_content": "The device policy manager deals with the power capability request and change management. It operates"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 810, 627, 822], "text_content": "according to the decision algorithm described in the following section."},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 840, 98, 853], "text_content": "3.3"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 840, 310, 854], "text_content": "Auto-run mode"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 857, 912, 869], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 implements a hardcoded decision algorithm that allows the device to negotiate in autonomous"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 872, 927, 884], "text_content": "way a power delivery transaction with a source according to the PDO (power data objects) profiles programmed in"},
	{"bbox_2d": [166, 887, 240, 899], "text_content": "the NVM."},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 976, 158, 984], "text_content": "DS12499-Rev 8"},
	{"bbox_2d": [868, 976, 927, 984], "text_content": "page 10/42"}
]
```
